ranges.notes: Cool, mild weather; festive atmosphere with Three Kings Day celebrations; moderate crowds mainly local families and tourists interested in cultural events.
Coldest period of the year, low tourist activity; some rainy days; city is quiet but some museums and attractions remain open.
Weather starts to improve slightly with mild days; low to moderate crowds; good for cultural visits and avoiding peak season prices.
Still cool but improving weather; some rainy days; fewer tourists, quiet city ambiance; good for budget travelers and cultural sightseeing.
Festive carnival period with colorful parades and local traditions; mild weather; crowds increase but manageable.
Post-carnival period with lower crowds; temperatures rising slightly; good for outdoor exploring before spring crowds.
Spring begins; mild and pleasant weather; moderate crowds start to form; great for walking and sightseeing.
Weather very good; city begins to buzz with Semana Santa preparations; excellent time to experience local culture before the big crowds.
Warm, sunny days; early spring flowers bloom; good for outdoor activities; moderate visitors but lower than April peak.

ranges.event: Semana Santa (Holy Week) - Dates vary, often early to mid-April
ranges.notes: One of the most important religious and cultural events in Cordoba; spectacular processions; very crowded but unforgettable experience; mild warm weather.
Post Semana Santa period with residual crowds; weather warm and pleasant; good for sightseeing and outdoor dining.

ranges.event: Patios Festival (Fiesta de los Patios) - Usually mid to late May but can start late April
ranges.notes: Early patios bloom with flowers; pleasant temperatures; increasing tourists but still manageable; great cultural experience with open private patios decorated with flowers.
Peak month for the famous Patios Festival; spectacular floral displays throughout the city; warm, sunny weather; very popular with tourists.
Warm to hot weather; still good for outdoor activities; crowd levels drop slightly after Patios Festival; good for exploring the Mezquita and old town.
Temperatures start rising significantly, often exceeding 30°C (86°F); outdoor sightseeing can be tiring; fewer tourists than May but heat can be intense.
Heat intensifies with daily highs often above 35°C (95°F); mid-day sightseeing uncomfortable; low season for tourism; many locals take holidays.
Peak summer heat with temperatures regularly above 38°C (100°F); many attractions close midday; very low tourism except some business travelers; not ideal for sightseeing.
Continued extreme heat; outdoor activities difficult; very low visitor numbers; best to avoid unless seeking quiet and low prices.
Slightly lower but still high temperatures; locals mostly on vacation; many shops and restaurants close mid-August; low tourist activity.
End of August sees temperatures easing; some cultural events restart; better for sightseeing but still warm; moderate low crowds.
Weather becomes pleasant again, temperatures drop to comfortable 25-30°C (77-86°F); crowds start to increase; good month for visits.
Continued pleasant weather; ideal for outdoor dining and walking; moderate tourists; good cultural events begin.
Mild autumn weather, cooling down to 20-25°C (68-77°F); fewer crowds than September; good for exploring historic sites and parks.
Stable weather; occasional rain; great month for cultural festivals and visiting museums; moderate crowds and comfortable temperatures.
Cooler temperatures averaging 15-20°C (59-68°F); increased rain; lower crowds; good for indoor cultural activities and budget travelers.
Similar conditions continue; off-season with fewer tourists; good for travelers looking to avoid crowds and enjoy museums and gastronomy.
Cool weather with occasional rain; beginning of festive season; moderate crowds around early December; good for cultural and holiday experiences.
Festive decorations, markets and events create a charming atmosphere; cooler weather but enjoyable; crowds increase but still manageable.
Holiday period with festive events; cool weather; moderate to high crowds from local and international visitors enjoying celebrations.
